variant_name: CONUS unified (Johnson, Marshall, Weiskittel; constrained nlsLM + components)
fitting_method: DG/HG: nlsLM with biological sign bounds + bound-widening (Cardinal SLURM 8831363, 8853801). HT-DBH: Wykoff form via nlsLM. HTLC: logistic crown form via nlsLM. Δ HCB: Hann-Hanus 2004 Eq 10 minus age term, annualized (no STDAGE). Mortality: cloglog GLM with log(REMPER) offset (annual rate). CR change: linear regression on log(DBH), log(HT+1), BAL, ELEV. Ingrowth: stand-level NB + logistic zero with REMPER offset.
